raw_response_text:
<explanation>
The target image shows a flower with multiple large, flat petals radiating from a central cluster of stamens, which is visually consistent with the structure of the flowers in class 81 (the pink/purple clematis-like flowers). Class 14 features yellow flowers with a distinct iris-like structure.
</explanation>

<response>81</response>
